title: Operations Associate
key_evidence: Experience required: 'Any (new graduates welcome)'. Required = track record of building things/side projects, fast execution, structural thinking, low ego/high agency — all Ryan strengths. No degree-match or SWE gate.

Preferred: prior early-stage startup experience (Ryan has 4.4yr first-employee), high-intensity environment, AI tools to multiply output (Ryan builds Claude Code agents) — Ryan hits all three preferreds.
Salary £50K-£70K — clears Ryan's £50k floor. Visa sponsorship 'not required' (Ryan UK-authorized, fine).

Funding: $374M raised (Kindred, TCV), YC S24, ~100 employees, founded 2024. SF-HQ with London office. Role reports to Head of Operations — likely hiring-manager read, but at 100 people there may be a recruiter first-pass.

Domain = full-stack insurance carrier (regulated insurance). NOT Ryan's crypto/AI domain; he can do the ops work but is not memorable/differentiated here vs a consulting/banking-background applicant the 'preferred' list also courts.

MAJOR CONVERSION RISK: in-office 6-7 days/week in London, plus a 48-hour in-person work trial. Ryan is Cambridge-based relocating to London; 6-7 day in-office is punishing and the trial is a high commitment for an ops-generalist role he isn't differentiated in.
biggest_lever: Ryan cleanly clears every stated requirement and all three 'preferred' bullets (early-stage startup, high agency, AI-tools-to-multiply-output), and the role explicitly welcomes any experience level.
biggest_risk: 6-7 days/week in-office + 48hr in-person work trial is a heavy commitment for a generalist ops role where Ryan is merely adequate (not spiked) and competes against consulting/banking/military profiles the listing specifically courts; conversion realism is low.
apply_verdict: Secondary priority — strong on-paper requirements fit but Ryan isn't differentiated and the 6-7 day office + work-trial cadence is a real lifestyle/conversion concern. Apply only if he genuinely wants intense in-person insurance-ops.
recency_note: YC page Posted=2026-04-12 (slug QkzDlzY still live HTTP200). 58 days / 8-12wk. NOTE this generic 'Operations Associate' is NOT on Corgi's live Ashby board (which lists Financial/Strategic/Strategy Ops Associates dated Jun 2026) - YC date may be sticky; medium confidence.
momentum_signals: MAJOR FRESH FUNDING (strong positive): $160M Series B led by TCV (May 2026) FOLLOWED by an additional $106-108M Series B1 (Jun 2026), pushing Corgi to a ~$2.6B valuation. Total raised ~$374M. Source: TAMradar, Reinsurance News, search Jun 2026.

AGGRESSIVE HIRING: ~50 open roles across SF/London/Chicago/Dallas/NY (BDR, full-stack eng GBP90-140k London, strategic finance, legal, controller). Post-raise expansion into AI Coverage, trucking, payroll verticals. Explicitly 'aggressive hiring targeting full-stack engineers, sales, and ex-founders'.
HEADCOUNT TRAJECTORY: 59-person team heavy on ex-founders (co-founders Emily Yuan ex-OpenAI PM + Nico Laqua), founded 2024, scaling fast - clear growth trajectory.
LONDON OFFICE ACTIVELY SCALING (early 2026) for European BDR/eng - the London Operations Associate (GBP50-70K, new-grads welcome) seat sits in this scaling office.
NO RED FLAGS: no layoffs/down-round - the opposite (up-round B1 at higher valuation weeks after B). Strongest momentum in batch.
live_seat_finding: LIVE-SEAT CONFIRMED. The YC/WorkAtAStartup 'Operations Associate' (London, GBP50-70K, new grads welcome, slug QkzDlzY) is STILL listed and live on ycombinator.com as of 2026-06-09. The earlier-flagged Ashby 'corgi' board (BDR/ETF/quant/legal roles in US cities, dated Jun 2026) is a DIFFERENT corgi slug (asset-management/ETF entity) and does NOT supersede this seat - it is not the YC AI-insurance Corgi's board. The YC AI-insurance Corgi (corgi.insure) does NOT expose a public dated Ashby board; its roles live on YC/WorkAtAStartup. CONCLUSION: this Operations Associate seat is genuinely live, NOT superseded; YC posting date 2026-04-12 may be sticky but the role and company are demonstrably hiring hard.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE 2026-06-10 via YC page (slug QkzDlzY, HTTP200, 'Apply' button active, no closure notice). JSON-LD datePosted 2026-04-12 unchanged (sticky), 59 days, no repost. G_recency held 18 (8-12wk band). callback_op unchanged 65.
operator_fit_note: YES - genuine early-stage generalist ops seat (new-grads welcome, prizes startup exp + AI-tools-to-multiply-output + high agency); maps cleanly to Ryan's first-employee/FA + Claude-Code spikes. Insurance domain + consulting/banking competition dilute slightly.
momentum_note: Green - strongest momentum in batch. $160M Series B (May) + $106M B1 (Jun 2026) at $2.6B valuation, ~50 open roles, London office scaling, zero red flags. H=88 lifts callback meaningfully despite stale/sticky YC posting date and 6-7 day in-office conversion concern. callback_v2 57 -> callback_v3 63.
